creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
Created attachment 233562
git diff for shells/rc

MASTERSITES has been gone for a couple of years.
It moved to github. The git diff attached accounts
for that and a couple of changes to source.

CHANGES
Makefile
distinfo
pkg-descr
files/pacth-Makefile.in (removed)
files/patch-Makefile.am (added)

That's it.

Passes check-plist, stage-qa, check-sanity && portlint

Thanks!

--Chris
